title: Dimension Toggler
description: Dimension Toggler is a lightweight Paper plugin that lets server operators instantly enable or disable access to the Nether and the End. Players can still light portals, but attempting to enter a disabled dimension will stop them and display a message.
body:
ToggleDimensions is a lightweight and intuitive Paper plugin that gives server operators instant control over access to the Nether and the End. With a simple /toggle command, staff can enable or disable dimension travel on the fly without removing portals or modifying world files. Players can still light portals normally, but any attempt to enter a disabled dimension is safely blocked and accompanied by a clear message, making it perfect for progression‑based servers, events, or worlds where access needs to be managed dynamically. Designed for simplicity and reliability, ToggleDimensions works out of the box, requires no configuration, and fully supports Paper 1.21.10 and 1.21.11 with a single build.

/toggle end --> disables or enables the end
/toggle nether --> diables or enables the nether
